title: www_justice_gov_uk_courts_procedure_rules_civil_contents_frontmatter_Notes29_a_1_2016a645c7.html
content: NOTES TO ACCOMPANY OCTOBER 2002 29th SUPPLEMENT – Civil Procedure Rules – Justice UK Cookie Settings Are you OK with cookies? We use small files called ‘cookies’ on www.justice.gov.uk. Some are essential to make the site work, some help us to understand how we can improve your experience, and some are set by third parties. You can choose to turn off the non-essential cookies. Which cookies are you happy for us to use? I am OK with cookies Only use essential cookies Choose which cookies we use Close Choose which cookies we use Marketing cookies Off On Google Analytics Off On We use Google Analytics to measure how you use the website so we can improve it based on user needs. We do not allow Google Analytics to use or share the data about how you use this site. See our Google Analytics cookies Google Analytics Name Purpose Expires _ga These help us count how many people visit justice.gov.uk by tracking if you’ve visited before 2 years _gid These help us count how many people visit justice.gov.uk by tracking if you’ve visited before 24 hours _gat These help us to manage how we collect analytics when we have lots of visitors on the site at one time 10 minutes Google Analytics Events Off On We use Google Analytics events to measure clicks within the pages and extended usage of the site See our Google Analytics Events cookies Google Analytics Events Name Purpose Expires _ga These help us count how many people visit justice.gov.uk by tracking if you’ve visited before 2 years Essential cookies Always on All users These cookies will always need to be on because they make our site work. See our All users cookies All users Name Purpose Expires wordpress_test_cookie This is used to test whether the browser accepts cookies When you close your browser PHPSESSID This is used to link your device to the information sent to the server from your browser. It is typically used to avoid you having to retype information when moving from one page to another. When you close your browser ccfw-banner-hidden Lets us know you have chosen which cookies are used so we can stop the cookie banner appearing when you return to the site. 1 year ccfw-gtm-allowed Lets us know you have accepted certain cookies so we can stop them loading when you return to the site. 1 year ccfw-time This is used to store the cookie expiry dates so we know when to ask you again for consent. 1 year ccfw_gtm_id This cookie is used to link the cookie consent banner to Google Tag Manager 1 year Logged in users These cookies apply when users log in. They will always be on because they make our site work. See our Logged in users cookies Logged in users Name Purpose Expires wordpress_[hash] This authenticates you when you log in to the admin area When you close your browser wordpress_logged_in This shows the site that you’re logged in and who you are so you can access the functions you need When you close your browser wordpress_sec If you are logged in as a site admin, this stores your authentication details. When you close your browser wp-settings-{time}-[UID] The number on the end [UID] is your individual user ID from the users database. 1 year > Save cookie preferences . Home   Courts Procedure rules Offenders Search Courts Procedure rules Civil contents frontmatter NOTES TO ACCOMPANY OCTOBER 2002 29th SUPPLEMENT Home » Courts » Procedure rules » Civil » contents » frontmatter » NOTES TO ACCOMPANY OCTOBER 2002 29th SUPPLEMENT Menu ≡ NOTES TO ACCOMPANY OCTOBER 2002 29th SUPPLEMENT Amendments to existing material are included as follows: Rules Part 3 Rule 3.7 In paragraph (1) sub-paragraph (a) ‘listing questionnaire’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check list (listing questionnaire)’. In sub-paragraphs (b) and (c) ‘listing questionnaire’ replaced by ‘pre-trial checklist’. Part 5 Rule 5.5 New paragraph 5.5 inserted. Part 6 THIS LINK HAS BEEN ARCHIVED. PLEASE CHECK THIS LINK Rule 6.18 New paragraph (k) replaces existing text. THIS LINK HAS BEEN ARCHIVED. PLEASE CHECK THIS LINK Rule 6.19(1)(b) New sub-paragraphs (ii) and (iii) replace existing text. THIS LINK HAS BEEN ARCHIVED. PLEASE CHECK THIS LINK Rules 6.32 – 6.35 New Section IV (Service of foreign process) inserted. Part 19 Rule 19.7A New rule inserted. Rule 19.8A New rule replaces existing rule. Part 25 Rule 25.1(1) ‘and’ omitted at the end of sub-paragraph (m) new sub-paragraph (o) inserted after sub-paragraph (n). Part 28 Rule 28.4(1)(a) , 28.6(1) ‘listing questionnaire’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check list’. Rule 28.5 Existing wording replaced by amended wording. Part 29 Rule 29.2(3)(b) , 29.5(1)(c) and 29.8(a) ‘listing questionnaire’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check list’. Rule 29.6 Existing wording replaced by amended wording. Rule 29.7 ‘pre-trial check lists’ substituted for ‘listing questionnaires’. Part 34 New title : ‘WITNESSES, DEPOSITIONS AND EVIDENCE FOR FOREIGN COURTS’ replaces existing title. Rule 34.1 Existing wording replaced by amended wording. Rule 34.15 Cross-reference in brackets deleted. Rules 34.16 – 34.21 New Section II (Evidence for foreign courts) adding rules 34.16 – 34.21 inserted. Part 40 Rule 40.4 Second cross reference in brackets deleted. Part 44 Rule 44.12A(4) In sub-paragraph (a)(i) ‘to be determined by detailed assessment’ inserted after ‘order for costs’. Rule 44.15(3) In sub-paragraph (b) ‘listing questionnaire’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check list (listing questionnaire)’. ‘listing questionnaire’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check list’ in the cross-reference. Rule 44.16 The existing wording of the sentence after paragraph (b) commencing ‘the court may adjourn the hearing……’ replaced by amended wording. Part 47 Rule 47.14 In paragraph (6) ‘person’ replaced by ‘party’. Rule 47.19 In the cross reference in brackets ‘unless the court orders otherwise’ inserted after ‘an assisted person’. Part 48 Rule 48.6 Paragraphs 3 & 4 existing wording replaced by amended wording. Rule 48.7 Existing paragraph (4) replaced by new wording. Rule 48.10 This rule was renumbered as 48.9 in error when the original rule 48.9 was revoked by SI 2001/256. Its correct number has now been restored. A note has also been inserted to indicate the revocation of 48.9. Part 54 Rule 54.16 In paragraph (1) figure ‘(1)’ inserted after 8.6. Part 55 Rule 55.2 In paragraph (2) sub-paragraph (a) ‘and’ omitted. After sub-paragraph (b) new paragraph (c) inserted. Cross reference in brackets omitted. Rules 55.20 – 55.28 New Section III – Interim Possession Orders, adding rules 55.20 – 55.28 inserted. Part 57 Existing title replaced by ‘PROBATE AND INHERITANCE’. Rule 57.1 In paragraph (1) ‘and’ omitted at the end of sub-paragraph (b), new sub-paragraph (d) inserted. Rules 57.14 – 57.16 New Section IV (Claims under the Inheritance (Provision for Family and Dependants) Act 1975 adding rules 57.14 – 57.16 inserted. Part 62 Rule 62.20 In paragraph (1) ‘RSC Order 71, Part 1 applies in relation to the award as it applies’ replaced by new wording. In paragraph (2)(a) ‘country of the original court’ replaced by ‘State of origin’. In paragraph (2)(b) ‘RSC Order 71, rule 3’ replaced by ‘rule 74.4’. Rule 62.21 Existing paragraph (2) replaced by new wording. In paragraph (4) ‘RSC Order 71, rule 3’ replaced by ‘rule 74.4’. In paragraph (4)(b) ‘rule3(1)(c)(i) and(ii)’ replaced by ‘rule 74.4(2)(a) to (d)’. Part 64 New Part ‘Estates, Trusts and Charities’ inserted. Part 68 New Part ‘References to the European Court’ inserted. Part 69 New Part ‘Court’s power to appoint a receiver’ inserted. Part 70 Rule 70.1 In the cross-reference after paragraph (1) ‘51’ deleted. Rule 70.5 Existing paragraph (2) replaced by new wording. Part 74 New part ‘Enforcement of judgments in different jurisdictions’ inserted. Part 75 New part ‘Traffic Enforcement’ inserted. Schedules Schedule 1 RSC Order 15 Revoked RSC Order 30 Revoked RSC Order 44 Revoked RSC Order 51 Revoked RSC Order 52 In rule 1(4) existing wording ‘an order of committal may be made by a single judge of the Queen’s Bench Division’ replaced by new wording. RSC Order 69 Revoked RSC Order 70 Revoked RSC Order 71 Revoked THIS LINK HAS BEEN ARCHIVED. PLEASE CHECK THIS LINK RSC Order 77 In rule 15(1) paragraph (a) ‘70’ replaced by ‘69’. In paragraph (b) ‘51’ is deleted. In rule (16)(1) paragraph (c) ‘Order 30 or 51’ is replaced by ‘CPR Part 69’. RSC Order 85 Revoked RSC Order 87 Revoked RSC Order 92 Revoked THIS LINK HAS BEEN ARCHIVED. PLEASE CHECK THIS LINK RSC Order 93 Rules 6 and 21 revoked. RSC Order 99 Revoked RSC Order 108 Revoked RSC Order 114 Revoked RSC Order 115 In rule 8(1) ‘Order 30, rules 2 to 8’ replaced by ‘CPR Part 69’. Schedule 2 THIS LINK HAS BEEN ARCHIVED. PLEASE CHECK THIS LINK CCR Order 5 Rules 12 to 14 revoked. CCR Order 19 Revoked CCR Order 24 Rules 8 to 15 revoked. CCR Order 35 Revoked CCR Order 37 Revoked THIS LINK HAS BEEN ARCHIVED. PLEASE CHECK THIS LINK CCR Order 42 In rule 13(1) paragraph (a) ‘70’ replaced by ‘69’. After paragraph (a) ‘or’ inserted. Paragraph (c) deleted. In rule 14(1) ‘RSC Order 30’ replaced by ‘CPR Part 69’. CCR Order 48B Revoked CCR Order 49 Rule 20 revoked. Non-Statutory Cross-References Signposts which have no statutory authority have been deleted. The cross-references in question are those appearing immediately after the following rules : 2.11 (the reference to “RSC O.59 r.2C (appeals to the Court of Appeal) in Schedule 1” only) 3.3(6) 3.7(7) 6.16(6) 10.5 (the second and third notes only) 16.8 20.13(2) 34.15(3) 37.4(3) 39.2(4) 44.14(3) 45.5 48.9(6) RSC O.91 r.1(a) Please note that rules that have been revoked and not replaced will be marked as ‘revoked’ from this edition on. This has been done retrospectively to cover revocations from previous updates, but applies to the main parts only. Revocations in the RSC or CCR Orders set out in the Schedules to the CPR have not been recorded. Practice Directions THIS LINK HAS BEEN ARCHIVED. PLEASE CHECK THIS LINK Practice Direction 2 In paragraph 2.1 (2)(a) ‘Principal Probate Registry’ replaced by ‘Principle Registry of the Family Division’. Post code ‘WC1V 6HA’ amended to ‘WC1V 6NP’. Practice Direction 2B In paragraph 3.1 new sub-paragraph (g) inserted. In paragraph 9 the words ‘or section 204A’ inserted after ‘section 204’. Practice Direction 4 Revised to take account of changes to the table of forms. Practice Direction 5 In paragraph 5.3 existing paragraph (2) replaced by new wording. Practice Direction 5B New PD5B inserted on ‘Practice Direction – Pilot Scheme for Communication and Filing of Documents by E-Mail’. The new PD supplements rule 5.5. Practice Direction 7 Existing paragraph 2.7 replaced by new wording. Existing paragraph 3.4 replaced by new wording. Paragraph 3.6 (3) ‘Part 49’ replaced by ‘Parts 49 and 58-62’. Practice Direction 7B Paragraph 3.2 cross-references in brackets deleted. THIS LINK HAS BEEN ARCHIVED. PLEASE CHECK THIS LINK Practice Direction 7E Existing PD replaced by new PD. THIS LINK HAS BEEN ARCHIVED. PLEASE CHECK THIS LINK Practice Direction 8B In Section A Table 1 the following references have been deleted: RSC O.71 r2(1), RSC O.71 r38, RSC O.71 r.41, RSC O.79 r.10(2), RSC O.79 r.11(1), RSC O.82 r.8(2), RSC O.92 r.5(2), RSC O.93 r.6(2), RSC O.93 r.21, RSC O.99 r.3(1). In Section B Table B the following references have been deleted: RSC O.71 r.24, RSC O.11 r.2(2), CCR O.24 r.10(2)(a). Practice Direction 16 Existing paragraph 1.4 replaced by new text. Practice Direction 19B New paragraph 6.1A inserted. Practice Direction 23 Paragraph 12.1 ‘The current word processing system to be used is WordPerfect 5.1’ deleted. Practice Direction 24 The first sentence of the cross-reference deleted. Practice Direction 25C PD deleted. Practice Direction 26 In paragraph 10.2(2) ‘to which Part 49 (specialist proceedings) applies’ replaced by ‘to which any of Parts 49 or 58-62 apply’. Existing paragraphs 12.1 to 12.10 replaced by new paragraphs 12.1 to 12.6. Practice Direction 28 In paragraph 3.12 the first reference to ‘listing questionnaires’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check lists (listing questionnaires)’ and the second reference to ‘pre-trial check lists’. In paragraph 3.13(3) ‘listing questionnaire’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check list’. The existing heading above paragraph 6 replaced by ‘Pre-trial check lists (listing questionnaires)’. In paragraph 6.1(1) ‘listing questionnaire’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check list (listing questionnaire)’. In paragraph 6.1(2) ‘listing questionnaires’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check lists’, ‘listing questionnaire’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check list’ and ‘questionnaires’ replaced by ‘check lists’. In paragraph 6.1(3) ‘listing questionnaires’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check lists’. In paragraph 6.1(4) ‘questionnaires’ replaced by ‘check lists’. In paragraph 6.2 ‘listing questionnaire’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check list’ and ‘listing hearing’ replaced by ‘hearing’. In paragraph 6.3 the first reference to ‘listing hearing’ replaced by ‘hearing under rule 28.5(3)’ and the second reference by ‘such a hearing’. In paragraph 6.5 ‘listing questionnaire’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check list’. In (2) ‘listing directions’ replaced by ‘directions’. In the appendix references to ‘listing questionnaire’ or ‘listing questionnaires’ replaced by ‘pre-trial check-list’ or ‘pre-trial check lists’. Practice Direction 29 Paragraph 1.2 deleted In paragraph 2.2(b) ‘(as defined in CPR Part 49)’ deleted. The existing heading above paragraph 8 replaced by ‘Pre-trial check lists (listing questionnaires)’. In paragraph 8 existing references to ‘listing questionnaire’ replaced by ‘Pre-trial check list (listing questionnaire)’, references to ‘listing questionnaires’ replaced by ‘pre-trial checklists’ and references to ‘questionnaires’ replaced by ‘check list’. In paragraphs 8.3(2), 8.4 and 8.5 ‘listing hearing’ replaced by ‘hearing under rule 29.6(3)’. Practice Direction 31 In paragraph 3.2 ‘19’ replaced by ‘20’ in each place it occurs. Practice Direction 32 In paragraph 1.4(1) ‘Statutory Instrument’ deleted. Practice Direction 34 In paragraph 6.1 ‘Schedule 1 to Part 50 (RSC Order 70)’ replaced by ‘Section II of Part 34’. New paragraphs 6.3 and 6.4 inserted. THIS LINK HAS BEEN ARCHIVED. PLEASE CHECK THIS LINK Practice Direction 35 Paragraph 2.6 deleted. In paragraph 4 ‘1.2(8)’ replaced by ‘2.2(3)’. THIS LINK HAS BEEN ARCHIVED. PLEASE CHECK THIS LINK Practice Direction 37 New paragraphs 6.1, 6.2, 7.1, 7.2, 7.3, 7.4, 7.5, 8.1, 8.2, 9.1, 9.2, 9.3, 10.1 and 10.2 inserted. Practice Direction 39 In paragraph 1.5 sub-paragraph (11) deleted. Practice Direction 40 Introductory wording at top of page deleted. The heading ‘Section 1’ deleted. Existing Section 2 deleted entirely – including section heading (PD no longer divided into 2 sections). New paragraphs 9-15 inserted. Practice Direction 40B In paragraph 11 ‘and the provisions relating to interest in detailed assessment proceedings’ inserted after ‘assessment of costs’. Practice Direction 43–48 Existing paragraph 5.17 replaced by new wording. In par
